title: Add Multiple Products
description: Insert two new products at once: "Rice Cakes" (price: 3.99, category: "snacks") and "Coconut Oil" (price: 7.49, category: "household").
concept: insertMany() accepts an array of documents and inserts them all in a single operation. This is more efficient than calling insertOne() multiple times.
hint: Pass an array of documents: db.products.insertMany([{name: "Rice Cakes", ...}, {name: "Coconut Oil", ...}])
